_doc: Snapshot of which (theme, check-title) pairs are already failing on
pre-push, and CI's theme-gate set automatically), bin/check.py prints
these as WARN-BASELINE in yellow and does NOT count them toward its
exit code -- only NEW failures, introduced by the current branch,
from a detached `git worktree` at origin/main so the snapshot
reflects main's reality and not the feature branch's.
This file was extended on the 'automate-theme-pipeline' branch to
absorb the *initial* findings from new gates added on that branch:
the perceptual-diversity check (`Product photographs are visually
distinct within a theme`) flagged near-duplicate product staging on
every shipping theme, and aero ships per-theme product photographs
without the matching product-images.json yet. Those are the
current-theme-sweep todo's responsibility to fix; until then the
gate runs in `incubating` mode so unrelated PRs are not blocked.

failures.check: Product photographs are visually distinct within a theme
